quote: I studied English for 10 years and still froze in conversations. Three months here and I actually forgot I was speaking a second language.
The coffee chats changed everything. No pressure, no grading — just talking to people who wanted to hear what I had to say.
I wanted to help my kids with their homework without feeling embarrassed. Now I'm the one correcting them.
Board game nights taught me more real English than any textbook ever did. Turns out that's exactly the point.
